title: citrus pseudoaurantium
intro: Citrus pseudoaurantium, also known as bitter orange or Seville orange, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family and is often considered a hybrid between Citrus aurantium and Citrus paradisi. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce nausea due to its high concentration of limonoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Citrus pseudoaurantium include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve circulation, and lower cholesterol levels. Citrus pseudoaurantium is commonly prepared as an essential oil or a herbal tea, and is also used as a flavoring agent in various food products.
